title: calochortus tolmiei
intro: Calochortus tolmiei, also known as the Sierra Mariposa Lily, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The roots and flowers of Calochortus tolmiei can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
